induction_input: The report the manager reviewed passed.
The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The letter the student wrote survived.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The song the artist recorded charted.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences where a noun is followed by a relative clause (omitting "that") containing a subject-verb-object structure, ending with an intransitive verb.
induced_prompt: Write sentences where a noun is followed by a relative clause (omitting "that") containing a subject-verb-object structure, ending with an intransitive verb.
l2_sentences: The book she read yesterday disappeared.
The cat my neighbor adopted constantly meows.
The song the choir performed beautifully echoed.
The letter he wrote carefully survived.
The flower the gardener planted daily bloomed.
l1_sentences: The report the manager reviewed passed.
The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The letter the student wrote survived.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The song the artist recorded charted.
